poojaBooking.footerText: Temple also available for Birthdays, Weddings, Anniversaries, Pooja, Mundan, Havan & More. For any bookings or more information please call Karan Goyal@604-543-9442, Mohan Moudgil@ 778-822-4501

carPooja.title: Car Pooja
carPooja.aboutText: Bless Your New Car In the Right Way Bought a new car? Ready to go for the first drive? But, don't forget to bless your new car first with divine gifts. Here's the right way to do the car puja: When a new car is bought, it is blessed with some divine gifts and a puja is performed before going for the first drive.
carPooja.termsAndConditions: T&C:\nBook Your Puja And Select Your Preferred Date. Call Temple To Confirm Priest Availability!

archana.title: Archana
archana.aboutText: Perform an Archana (special, personal, abbreviated puja) invoking individual guidance and blessings. A short but powerful prayer and offering to the deity.
archana.termsAndConditions: T&C:\nBook Your Puja And Select Your Preferred Date. Call Temple To Confirm Priest Availability!

abhishekam.title: Abhishekam
abhishekam.aboutText: Abhishekam is a ritualistic bathing of the deity with materials like milk, yogurt, honey, ghee, and pure water, accompanied by the chanting of sacred mantras. It is performed to purify the soul and receive divine grace.
abhishekam.termsAndConditions: T&C:\nBook Your Puja And Select Your Preferred Date. Call Temple To Confirm Priest Availability!

footer.newsletterText: Sign up for our newsletter to receive the new releases directly to your inbox.
